compiled_state.title: Create DSO staged CI workflow template (4-job pipeline)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED — new source file with no existing tests; RED test task ea9d-ed23 must be completed first.

## Story DD Coverage
This task satisfies:
- DD1: CI workflow template with 3 needs:-chained jobs (lint/format → tests → LLM review placeholder); plus validate-ci job parallel to LLM review
- DD2: Commands resolve without DSO plugin in CI runner (GitHub Variables for lint/test; validate.sh accessible via repo path)
- DD3: validate-ci job is a separate Actions job with needs:[tests], exits non-zero when validate.sh --ci fails

## What
Create plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml — a static GitHub Actions workflow YAML with 4 jobs:

### Job 1: lint-format (root job, no needs:)
- Step 1: Checkout (actions/checkout@v4)
- Step 2: Run lint — run: ${{ vars.DSO_LINT_CMD }}
  (if vars.DSO_LINT_CMD is empty, emit a diagnostic and exit 0 — advisory only)
- Step 3: Run format check — run: ${{ vars.DSO_FORMAT_CHECK_CMD }}
- timeout-minutes: 5

### Job 2: tests (needs: [lint-format])
- Step 1: Checkout (actions/checkout@v4)
- Step 2: Run tests — run: ${{ vars.DSO_TEST_CMD }}
- timeout-minutes: 30
- env: SUITE_TEST_INDEX: ${{ github.workspace }}/.test-index

### Job 3: llm-review (needs: [tests])
- PLACEHOLDER — actual LLM review integration is in story bea2-bd5e (OUT OF SCOPE)
- Step 1: Checkout (actions/checkout@v4)
- Step 2: LLM review placeholder — run: echo "LLM review placeholder — configure in story bea2-bd5e"
- timeout-minutes: 15

### Job 4: validate-ci (needs: [tests])
- Runs parallel to llm-review (both depend on tests, neither depends on each other)
- Step 1: Checkout (actions/checkout@v4)
- Step 2: Run DSO validation — run: bash plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci
  env: CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT: ${{ github.workspace }}/plugins/dso
- timeout-minutes: 15

## Workflow trigger
- on: pull_request (branches: [main]), push (branches: [main]), workflow_dispatch
- name: CI (matches ci.workflow_name=CI in dso-config.conf; onboarding story a592-0992 sets this)
- concurrency: group ci-${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}, cancel-in-progress: true

## Portability requirements
- MUST NOT reference read-config.sh or CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT via plugin scripts API
- DSO_LINT_CMD and DSO_TEST_CMD read from GitHub Variables (vars.*) — no fallback to read-config.sh
- validate.sh is accessed via direct repo path (plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh) after checkout
- CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT is set as env var in the validate-ci step (not from plugin scripts)

## File location
- plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml (NEW FILE)
- Note: plugins/dso/templates/ directory may need to be created

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages)
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml
- [ ] YAML is parseable without errors
  Verify: python3 -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml'))"
- [ ] 4 required jobs present: lint-format, tests, llm-review, validate-ci
  Verify: python3 -c "import yaml; d=yaml.safe_load(open('plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml')); jobs=d['jobs']; [jobs[k] for k in ('lint-format','tests','llm-review','validate-ci')]"
- [ ] tests job needs lint-format
  Verify: python3 -c "import yaml; d=yaml.safe_load(open('plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml')); assert 'lint-format' in d['jobs']['tests']['needs']"
- [ ] llm-review job needs tests
  Verify: python3 -c "import yaml; d=yaml.safe_load(open('plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml')); assert 'tests' in d['jobs']['llm-review']['needs']"
- [ ] validate-ci job needs tests
  Verify: python3 -c "import yaml; d=yaml.safe_load(open('plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml')); assert 'tests' in d['jobs']['validate-ci']['needs']"
- [ ] No read-config.sh or CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT script-path refs in template
  Verify: ! grep -q 'read-config\.sh\|CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT.*scripts' plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml
- [ ] validate-ci step runs validate.sh --ci
  Verify: grep -q 'validate\.sh.*--ci\|validate\.sh --ci' plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml
- [ ] test-ci-dso-staged-template.sh passes (GREEN — all structural assertions pass)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-ci-dso-staged-template.sh
